examples: You can't make an omelette without breaking eggs.
It might make a larger omelette but a bigger egg isn't necessarily a better one and it certainly doesn't make the hen that laid it very happy.
The omelette fell splat onto the floor.
And if some eggs have to be broken to make our knowledge omelette, well, too bad.
En otro, puedo desayunarme una omelette de claras de huevos y espinacas que es una delicia.
